Find and import LD score files

Source: R/POLYFUN_gather_ldscores.R
POLYFUN_gather_ldscores.Rd

Find and import LD score files

Usage

POLYFUN_gather_ldscores(output_prefix)

See also

Other polyfun: POLYFUN(), POLYFUN_compute_priors(), POLYFUN_download_ref_files(), POLYFUN_find_folder(), POLYFUN_finemapper(), POLYFUN_gather_annotations(), POLYFUN_help(), POLYFUN_import_priors(), POLYFUN_initialize(), POLYFUN_munge_summ_stats(), POLYFUN_prepare_snp_input(), POLYFUN_run_ldsc()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
output_prefix <- file.path(
    system.file("tools/polyfun/gold", "",
                package = "echofinemap"),
    "testrun.22"
)
ldscore <- POLYFUN_gather_ldscores(output_prefix=output_prefix)
} # }
